== Notes for [[Item:Q116590|Q116590]] ==

Comte de Reims (4e)

Comte de Roucy

No evidence supporting his ancestry, but often said to have been a son of [http://www.geni.com/people/Jaussaume-de-Reims/4879487546210132008 Jaussaume de Reims].

#Générale##Générale#Profession : 4ème Comte de Reims & de Roucy.

Rootsweb Feldman
URL: http://worldconnect.genealogy.rootsweb.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=:3044567&id=I23259
# ID: I23259
# Name: Remigius DE TOULOUSE 1 2 3 4 5
# Sex: M
# Change Date: 15 JAN 2004 5
# Change Date: 19 OCT 2001 2 3 4 5
# Note:

[Joanne's Tree.1 GED.GED]

2 SOUR S332582
3 DATA
4 TEXT Date of Import: 14 Jan 2004


[daveanthes.FTW]

TYPE Book
AUTH Stuart, Roderick W.
PERI Royalty for Commoners
EDTN 3d
PUBL Genealogical Publishing co., Inc, Baltimore, MD (1998)
ISB 0-8063-1561-X
TEXT (328-40)
DATE 19 MAY 2000[Spare.FTW]

Marriage 1 Arsinde DE TOULOUSE

Children

1. Has Children Berta DE TOULOUSE b: BEF 834 in France


Sources:

1. Title: daveanthes.FTW
Note: ABBR daveanthes.FTW
Note: Source Media Type: Other
Repository:
Call Number:
Media: Book
Text: Date of Import: 14 Jan 2004
2. Title: daveanthes.FTW
Note: ABBR daveanthes.FTW
Note: Source Media Type: Other
Repository:
Call Number:
Media: Book
Text: Date of Import: Jan 13, 2004
3. Title: Spare.FTW
Repository:
Call Number:
Media: Other
Text: Date of Import: Jan 18, 2004
4. Title: Spare.FTW
Repository:
Call Number:
Media: Other
Text: Date of Import: 21 Jan 2004
5. Title: Joanne's Tree.1 GED.GED
Repository:
Call Number:
Media: Other
Text: Date of Import: Feb 6, 2004

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
